title: IPinfo API Response
description: Schema for IPinfo API response across Lite, Core, and Plus tiers

hostname.description: The hostname associated with the IP address.

geo.description: Geographic location information for the IP address.

city.description: The city where the IP address is located.

region.description: The region or state where the IP address is located.

region_code.description: The two-letter region code in ISO 3166 format.

country.description: The country where the IP address is located.

country_code.description: The ISO 3166 country code of the IP address.

continent.description: The continent where the IP address is located.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the IP address location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the IP address location.

timezone.description: The local timezone of the IP address location, formatted according to the IANA Time Zone Database.

postal_code.description: The postal or zip code associated with the IP address location.

dma_code.description: The Designated Market Area (DMA) code, representing a TV media market region.

geoname_id.description: The unique numerical identifier for geographic locations from Geonames.org.

radius.description: The location accuracy radius in kilometers.

last_changed.description: The date when the IP address's location was last updated, in YYYY-MM-DD format (ISO-8601).

as.description: Autonomous System (AS) information for the IP address.

asn.description: The Autonomous System Number (ASN) identifying the organization that owns or operates the IP address.

name.description: The official name of the Autonomous System (AS) organization.

domain.description: The official domain name of the Autonomous System (AS) organization.

type.description: The type of the Autonomous System (AS) organization, such as hosting, ISP, education, government, or business.

last_changed.description: The date when the IP address's ASN was last updated, in YYYY-MM-DD format (ISO-8601).

mobile.description: Mobile carrier information for the IP address.

name.description: The name of the mobile carrier organization.

mcc.description: The Mobile Country Code (MCC) of the carrier.

mnc.description: The Mobile Network Code (MNC) of the carrier.

anonymous.description: Anonymity and privacy service detection information.

is_proxy.description: Indicates whether the IP address is an open web proxy.

is_relay.description: Indicates whether the IP address is part of an anonymous relay service, such as iCloud Private Relay.

is_tor.description: Indicates whether the IP address is a TOR (The Onion Router) exit node.

is_vpn.description: Indicates whether the IP address is a Virtual Private Network (VPN) exit node.

name.description: The name of the privacy service provider, such as a VPN, Proxy, or Relay service provider.

is_anonymous.description: Indicates whether the IP address is anonymous. true if the IP address is associated with an IP privacy service.

is_anycast.description: Indicates whether the IP address is an anycast IP. true if the IP address maps to multiple physical servers.

is_hosting.description: Indicates whether the IP address is an internet service hosting IP address.

is_mobile.description: Indicates whether the IP address belongs to a mobile network.

is_satellite.description: Indicates whether the IP address is part of a satellite internet connection.
